address.location: Gat No. 525, 473/A, Behind Onkareshwar Temple, YADRAV-ICHALKARNJI Read Tal- Shirol
address.map_location: Sharad Institute of Technology College of Engineering

pos_sentences.text: Library is very good and peaceful to study
pos_sentences.name: Sandesh Subhash Kalyanshetty

pos_sentences.text: Teaching facility and supporting staff is good
pos_sentences.name: Akash

pos_sentences.text: Timely exam conducted on every topic also examin well
pos_sentences.name: Akash

pos_sentences.text: The library is soo clean and nice seperate study rooms digital section is available
pos_sentences.name: Shreyash Shital patil

pos_sentences.text: Digital slides and animation techniques are used to teach for better understand
pos_sentences.name: SARVESH SOGATE

pos_sentences.text: The placements are good if students have completed their task perfectly as per faculty guidance the placements is easy
pos_sentences.name: SARVESH SOGATE

pos_sentences.text: Proper arrangements of events and many cultural rechnical events is good here internships and placements are good
pos_sentences.name: Ashish Ajit Kothale

pos_sentences.text: The industrial tranning and project completion here is very nice which helps fo placement
pos_sentences.name: Parth Abhyuday Desai

pos_sentences.text: The social activity takes place in the institute for students such as the industry visit and the Technical Events at national also carried out here.
pos_sentences.name: Vardham Prakash Demanna

pos_sentences.text: Bus facility are too good as compared to other colleges.
pos_sentences.name: Divyani Pujari

neg_sentences.text: The projectors provided by the college are very bad
neg_sentences.name: Sandesh Subhash Kalyanshetty

neg_sentences.text: Every staff was non attractive no good knowing
neg_sentences.name: Akash

neg_sentences.text: Harsment too much for small activities at every time
neg_sentences.name: Akash

neg_sentences.text: There are no hostel for boys and it is too far away from the college
neg_sentences.name: Shreyash Shital patil

neg_sentences.text: The computer labs are not well furnished and maintened many of the computers softwares are not updated and lots of them where locked
neg_sentences.name: SARVESH SOGATE

neg_sentences.text: The classrooms are not proper small classrooms less benches for sitting not well proper ventilated classrooms
neg_sentences.name: SARVESH SOGATE

neg_sentences.text: Lack of internet facility that most days internet is not provided at the time of practicals.
neg_sentences.name: Divyani Pujari

neg_sentences.text: Co-ed policy of not letting girls and boys collaborate in teams to work towards the plan / project
neg_sentences.name: Prathmesh Babel

neg_sentences.text: Less interaction with students and less development
neg_sentences.name: Anonymous

neg_sentences.text: there are no playgroud for sports & cultural activities
neg_sentences.name: ayush manish ranbhare
